message:
feat(sqlmodel): enhance query DSL, validation, and expression building

Comprehensive improvements to the SQLModel ORM framework:

Query expressions (expr.rs):
- Rich expression DSL for building SQL predicates
- Binary operators: eq, ne, lt, le, gt, ge
- Logical operators: and, or, not
- IN/NOT IN clauses with subquery support
- LIKE/ILIKE pattern matching
- NULL checks: is_null, is_not_null
- BETWEEN ranges
- Expression composition and nesting

Select query builder (select.rs):
- Fluent API for SELECT queries
- Column selection with aliases
- JOIN support (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL)
- WHERE clause building from expressions
- GROUP BY and HAVING
- ORDER BY with direction
- LIMIT/OFFSET pagination
- DISTINCT support

Field handling (field.rs):
- Field metadata extraction from structs
- Column type mapping
- Nullable/required inference
- Default value handling
- Foreign key relationships

Validation (validate_derive.rs):
- Compile-time validation of SQLModel derives
- Field type checking
- Relationship validation
- Error reporting with spans

Macro improvements (parse.rs, lib.rs):
- Better attribute parsing
- Improved error messages
- Table name inference
- Column name customization

Session improvements (lib.rs):
- Transaction support
- Connection pooling integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
